data.title: "Monster High & KATSEYE release reimagined 'Fright Song' anthem; music video now streaming on YouTube. Mattel, Inc. collaboration."
data.description: Toy company Mattel, Inc. revealed a partnership between Monster High and girl group KATSEYE, introducing a revamped rendition of the brand's well-known song, "Fright Song." This musical collaboration is now accessible on various streaming and download platforms. Additionally, a dynamic music video accompanying the track is live on Monster High's YouTube channel and both brands' social media pages, showcasing the fusion of music and the next chapter for Monster High. This collaboration offers a fresh take on the brand's classic anthem to engage fans across different platforms.

data.title: NEL Animal Cardiovascular Center in South Korea performs the first ever surgical treatment for canine infective endocarditis, making history in veterinary medicine.
data.description: In Anyang, South Korea, the NEL Animal Cardiovascular Center recently made history by achieving the world's first successful surgical treatment of canine infective endocarditis in a dog. This groundbreaking procedure marks a significant milestone in veterinary medicine and demonstrates the center's expertise in handling complex cardiac cases in animals.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) jumps 20.8% post Protocol 23 upgrade, with PayPal integration plans and Franklin Templeton's $445M tokenization boosting. Bullish outlook.
data.description: Stellar (XLM) has experienced a significant surge of 20.8% within the past week. This increase in value can be attributed to multiple factors, including the Protocol 23 upgrade, PayPal's plans to integrate PYUSD, and Franklin Templeton's recent venture involving tokenizing assets worth $445 million. Experts suggest that these developments indicate a promising outlook for XLM and urge investors to consider its bullish potential.

data.title: Weave (NYSE: WEAV) to release Q2 2025 results on July 31, with call at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss.
data.description: Weave, a prominent customer experience and payments software platform catering to small and medium-sized healthcare businesses, declared it will unveil its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2025 subsequent to the closure of U.S. markets on Thursday, July 31, 2025.
